title: Nether Variant
description: Nether variant boats that can be crafted with nether wood types.
body: # Nether Variant *Take the Nether in style* [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-better-beaves) [![Organization](https://img.shields.io/badge/Organization-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/organization/cre8to-team) [![Feedback](https://img.shields.io/badge/feedback%20form%20(no%20login)-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=googleforms&color=indigo)](https://forms.gle/fkgMp6YroGjwH8Nr5) [![Donate@CupOfCoffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/donate%20a%20cup%20of%20coffee-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=patreon&color=black)](https://patreon.com/cre8to) ![AboutThePack](https://img.shields.io/badge/-About%20this%20mod-darkblue?style=for-the-badge) This mod introduces slick new boat types crafted from Nether woods — because lava biomes deserve luxury transport too Sail through the Nether with Crimson and Warped boats that fit the vibe and survive the heat. ![Key Features](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Key%20Features-darkblue?style=for-the-badge) * **Nether Boats:** New, themed boat variants crafted using Crimson or Warped wood * Fully compatible with vanilla water physics * Great for Nether-themed builds and adventurous aesthetics ![Warped And Crimson Boats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d074a41c8b1743464abbd3931bd3513b5520c4a.png)
